title: Engine Type
text: Engine Type Specify the engine type that Informix uses. USYS$INF_PARAMS { online | se } Arguments online ( o )— not allowed if IsolationLevel is set to ansi read uncommitted and access mode is set to read write ; default. se ( s )— not allowed if IsolationLevel is set to any value, or checking deferred is set, or lockmode N is set. Description The default is online . For more information on engine types, see your Informix documentation. Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
